name: amphibian:location:habitat
desc: Types of habitats where the amphibian is found (e.g., wetlands, forests, ponds). If the document does not mention any habitats, set this field to None.

name: amphibian:location:region
desc: Named geographic regions or areas where the amphibian occurs (e.g., Amazon basin, Pacific Northwest). If the document does not mention any regions, set this field to None.

name: amphibian:location:country
desc: Countries where the amphibian is found. If the document does not mention any countries, set this field to None.

name: amphibian:location:continent
desc: Continents where the amphibian is found. If the document does not mention any continents, set this field to None.

name: film:classification:rating
desc: Content rating assigned to the film (e.g., G, PG, PG-13, R, NC-17). If the document does not mention a film rating, set this field to None.

name: film:classification:genre
desc: Genres assigned to the film (e.g., comedy, drama, horror). If the document does not mention any film genres, set this field to None.

name: fish:classification:species
desc: Species-level classification of fish mentioned in the document. If the document does not mention any fish species, set this field to None.

name: fish:classification:genus
desc: Genus-level classification of fish mentioned in the document. If the document does not mention any fish genera, set this field to None.

name: fish:classification:family
desc: Family-level classification of fish mentioned in the document. If the document does not mention any fish families, set this field to None.

name: fish:classification:order
desc: Order-level classification of fish mentioned in the document. If the document does not mention any fish orders, set this field to None.

name: fish:classification:class
desc: Class-level classification of fish mentioned in the document. If the document does not mention any fish classes, set this field to None.

name: fish:classification:phylum
desc: Phylum-level classification of fish mentioned in the document. If the document does not mention any fish phyla, set this field to None.

name: fish:classification:kingdom
desc: Kingdom-level classification of fish mentioned in the document. If the document does not mention any fish kingdoms, set this field to None.

name: book:region
desc: Geographical regions associated with the book (e.g., where it is set, published, or thematically focused). If the document does not mention any book regions, set this field to None.

name: crime:film:theme
desc: Themes present in a crime film, such as motifs, central ideas, or recurring narrative elements. If the document does not mention any crime film themes, set this field to None.
